chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 719 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 04.09.2023 Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed M. Junejo, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel, under instructions, does not press this Criminal Misc. Application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Abdul Basit
